title: NaOH
description: I added some mods and texture packs aimed at enhancing players' game visuals and FPS, suitable for both survival redstone servers and vanilla survival gameplay.
body:
# English/英语
Welcome to use NaOH Modpack! This modpack is focused on optimizing the Minecraft gaming experience. Whether you're aiming for better game visuals, higher FPS, or you're a survival redstone server player, the NaOH modpack can meet your needs. We will regularly update the modpack with bug fixes and performance optimizations. You just need to enjoy the game; leave the rest to us.

# Chinese/中文
欢迎使用NaOH整合包！整合包专注于优化我的世界游戏体验。无论你的目标是更好的游戏视觉效果、更高的FPS，又或是你是一名生电服务器玩家，NaOH整合包都能满足你的需求。我们将定期更新整合包，修复bug,优化性能。你只需要享受游戏；剩下的交给我们。

# Keyboard

- G Freecam / 灵魂出窍
- H Night Vision / 夜视
- Z [litematica]EasyPlaceMode / 投影mod轻松放置
- B New Waypoint / 新建路标
- U Open Waypoint Screen / 显示设定的路标
- N Open World Map / 打开地图
- M Open litematica gui / 打开投影mod gui
- PgUp Gamma+ / 增加伽马值
- PgDn Gamma- / 减少伽马值
- Rshift Masa Gadget GUI / Masa全家桶GUI 
**StayTrue Texture Pack : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)**
